title: Azure Agentic AI Qualification Manifest
description: Proves who signed off on prerequisites for Path B/C engagements, with evidence bound to GitHub review + OIDC + sigstore Rekor. Validator and support intake re-verify on every operation.

path.description: A = Sandbox/Fast (qualification NOT required). B = Production/Enterprise. C = Expansion on top of prior attestation.

data_classification_signed_off_by.description: Email address of the role holder (for audit). Authoritative evidence is `prerequisites_signed_by` below.

prior_attestation_ref.description: Required for Path C. Rekor UUID of prior engagement's attestation.

prerequisites_signed_by.description: Every required role must appear with GitHub-review-backed evidence. At minimum: partner-lead + customer-sponsor.

approval_pr.description: URL of the PR where the 'Approved' review was submitted.

approval_sha.description: Commit SHA the review was bound to.

approval_actor_id.description: GitHub numeric user ID (immutable across handle renames).

org_membership_ref.description: GitHub org/team that must include this actor at review time (CODEOWNERS binding).

workflow.description: Path to GH Actions workflow that produced the in-toto attestation (e.g., `.github/workflows/qualify.yml`).

rekor_uuid.description: Sigstore Rekor transparency log entry UUID.

incident_log_ref.description: Path to docs/governance/incident-log.md for any compromise/revocation entries affecting this manifest's approvers.
